title: The Straw Hats Break Through Totto Land
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The Straw Hats break through Big Mom’s encirclement as allies buy time and Luffy’s fight reaches its conclusion.
scene: Luffy escapes the mirror world while Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates help the crew break through Big Mom’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Get out of my way... Fishmen!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Not good!! The sea is boiling up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's too hot. I can't stay close!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The Queen Mama Charter is almost there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I am not sure if this is

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Alright!! It made it in time!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, this is beyond my wildest dreams. ]>

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't even find the words ]] to describe it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What... What is this? What is this taste??

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a taste that could even make a dead puppy break into a dance.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Is like when a bomb is thrown...

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Finale storyline with 40 dialogue beats. The crew escapes Totto Land through the sacrifices and timing of Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates.
